na kṣudro 'pi prathamasukṛtāpekṣayā saṃśrayāya prāpte mitre bhavati vimukhaḥ kiṃ punar yas tathoccaiḥ kṣudro+'pi · vidyuddāmasphuritacakitais tatra paurāṅganānāṃ lolāpāṅgair yadi na ramase locanair vañcito 'si vañcito+'si · prāleyāstraṃ kamalavadanāt so 'pi hartuṃ nalinyāḥ pratyāvṛttastvayi kararudhi syād analpābhyasūyaḥ so+'pi · so 'tikrāntaḥ śravaṇaviṣayaṃ locanābhyām adṛṣṭas tvām utkaṇṭhāviracitapadaṃ manmukhenedam āha so+'tikrāntaḥ

na kṣudro 'pi prathamasukṛtāpekṣayā saṃśrayāya prāpte mitre bhavati vimukhaḥ kiṃ punar yas tathoccaiḥ tathā+uccais→tathoccaiḥ · kekotkaṇṭhā bhuvanaśikhino nityabhāsvatkalāpā nityajyotsnāḥ prahitatamovṛttiramyāḥ pradoṣāḥ kekā+utkaṇṭhāḥ→kekotkaṇṭhā · ādye baddhā virahadivase yā śikhā dāma hitvā śāpasyānte vigalitaśucā tāṃ mayodveṣṭanīyām mayā+udveṣṭanīyām→mayodveṣṭanīyām · sā saṃnyastābharaṇam abalā peśalaṃ dhārayantī śayyotsaṅge nihitam asakṛd duḥkhaduḥkhena gātram śayyā+utsaṅge→śayyotsaṅge
